records.question: Which stadiums had games where Pakhtakor was the home team with a score of 1–1 and the capacity percentage was exactly 95.3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.score = '1–1' AND game.home_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.capacity_percentage = 95.3
records.pred_sql:
SELECT stadium.id
FROM stadium
INNER JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE game.Home_team = 'Pakhtakor'
  AND game.Score = '1–1'
  AND stadium.Capacity_Percentage = 95.3

records.question: Which stadiums have a capacity percentage exactly 108.8, an average attendance of at least 87047, and at least 8 home games, where total attendance is at least 696377 and home team Quruvchi played League matches from season 2007 onward that ended with a 1–1 score?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.capacity_percentage = 108.8 AND stadium.average_attendance >= 87047.0 AND stadium.home_games >= 8 AND game.competition = 'League' AND stadium.total_attendance >= 696377.0 AND game.home_team = 'Quruvchi' AND game.season >= 2007 AND game.score = '1–1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.id
FROM stadium s
JOIN game g ON s.id = g.stadium_id
WHERE s.Capacity_Percentage = 108.8
  AND s.Average_Attendance >= 87047
  AND s.Home_Games >= 8
  AND s.Total_Attendance >= 696377
  AND g.Home_team = 'Quruvchi'
  AND g.Season >= 2007
  AND g.Competition = 'League'
  AND g.Score LIKE '%-1'

records.question: What stadiums have a total attendance of at most 569817 and an average attendance of no more than 71227, where a game with an away team of Pakhtakor ended with a score of 1–2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.total_attendance <= 569817.0 AND game.score = '1–2' AND game.away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND stadium.average_attendance <= 71227.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    stadium.id
FROM 
    stadium
INNER JOIN 
    game
ON 
    stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE 
    stadium.Total_Attendance <= 569817
    AND stadium.Average_Attendance <= 71227
GROUP BY 
    stadium.id
HAVING 
    SUM(CASE WHEN game.Away_team = 'Pakhtakor' AND game.Score = '1–2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0

records.question: Which stadiums have a capacity percentage of at most 97.1 and host games where the competition is Cup?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT stadium.id FROM stadium
JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.capacity_percentage <= 97.1 AND game.competition = 'Cup'

FROM stadium
INNER JOIN game ON stadium.id = game.stadium_id
WHERE stadium.Capacity_Percentage <= 97.1
  AND game.Competition = 'Cup'

records.question: Which stadiums have an average attendance of exactly 72620.0, a capacity percentage of exactly 98.4, total attendance of at least 580965.0, and hosted a game where the date is 31 October 2008?

WHERE stadium.capacity_percentage = 98.4 AND stadium.total_attendance >= 580965.0 AND game.date = '31 October 2008' AND stadium.average_attendance = 72620.0
